_comments.alma.set_id: Alma set ID containing MMS IDs to process
_comments.alma.library_code: Library code for creating representations (must be valid Alma library code)
_comments.alma.access_rights_code: Access rights policy code (empty = use system default)
_comments.alma.access_rights_desc: Access rights description (empty = use system default)
_comments.matching.files_root: Root path to file folders (for marc-907e) or input folder (for mms-id-filename)
_comments.matching.marc_subfield: MARC subfield for path extraction (default: e)
_comments.matching.file_extensions: File extensions for mms-id-filename strategy. Array: ["pdf", "tif"], string: "pdf", or empty/null for all extensions
_comments.aws.institution_code: Institution code for S3 path structure
_comments.options.dry_run: true for testing (no actual uploads), false for live mode
